_comment: Project-local Claude Code settings for the AI-Prowler autonomous task runner. Scoped to THIS project only — does not modify your global ~/.claude/settings.json.
_permission_note: The unattended runner passes --allowedTools 'mcp__ai-prowler__*' explicitly on the command line (see task_queue_automation.py build_wrapper_script_content) rather than relying on this file's permissions block, so scoping is visible and testable independent of local settings drift.
